falsification_rule_text: Descriptive — falsified by counter-fact. Falsified if 2022-2026 sees ZERO new Western large-reactor construction starts (other than pre- 2022 commitments) AND ZERO SMR first-of-a-kind construction starts AND fewer than 3 phase-out reversals AND fewer than 5 lifetime extensions. Each metric counted independently. Verdict tiers: "supported" = 4 of 5 metrics hit thresholds; "partial" = 3 of 5; "refuted (revival is rhetoric)" = ≤ 2 of 5.

variables_loaded.name: count_western_large_reactor_construction_starts_post_2022
variables_loaded.source: constructed: IAEA PRIS (Power Reactor Information System) construction-start records, filtered to OECD + UK + KOR + JPN, ≥1000 MWe Generation-III/III+. Manual-drop pending under data/manual/derived/.

variables_loaded.name: count_reactor_lifetime_extensions
variables_loaded.source: constructed: IAEA PRIS lifetime-extension licensing decisions (US NRC subsequent license renewal SLR; French ASN/IRSN visite décennale; Japan NRA 60+ extension). Manual-drop pending.

variables_loaded.name: log_total_announced_nuclear_capex_usd
variables_loaded.source: constructed: country-program announced + FID-confirmed capex: France EPR2 cost estimates (RTE / EDF + Cour des Comptes), UK Sizewell C strike-price + RAB-finance details, Vogtle 3+4 final cost, etc. Manual-drop pending.

variables_loaded.name: vogtle_4_levelised_cost_usd_per_mwh
variables_loaded.source: constructed: Georgia Power / Southern Company project costs / 60-year lifetime / capacity factor. Cross-check fred:CES2023700001 (US power gen employment). Manual-drop pending.

variables_loaded.name: post_2022_nuclear_revival_dummy
variables_loaded.source: constructed: indicator = 1 from 2022-08 onwards (post-energy-crisis policy framing window).

variables_loaded.name: post_fukushima_residual_phaseout_status
variables_loaded.source: constructed: indicator = 1 if country had a formal phase-out policy at 2021 baseline (DEU, BEL, ITA, ESP, CHE, TWN). Used to identify which countries had the most policy-distance to revival.

variables_missing.name: count_smr_first_of_a_kind_construction_starts
variables_missing.source: constructed: IAEA PRIS + ARIS (Advanced Reactor Information System) for SMR designs (NuScale, BWRX-300, X-energy Xe-100, Rolls-Royce SMR, etc.), construction-start records 2022-2026. Manual-drop pending.

variables_missing.name: phase_out_reversal_policy_count
variables_missing.source: constructed: count of formal phase-out reversals 2022-2026 (Sweden 2023 abandons phase-out target; Belgium 2023 lifetime extension; Netherlands 2024 new-build commitment; Italy 2024 lifting ban; Switzerland 2024 lifting ban). Manual-drop pending.

variables_missing.name: log_natural_gas_ttf
variables_missing.source: constructed: TTF EUR/MWh, monthly. eex fetcher pending.

variables_missing.name: nuclear_share_existing_generation
variables_missing.source: constructed: IEA / IRENA share of nuclear in country generation mix, 2021. Pre-existing reliance moderates revival probability.
